title: Parent adopted in
question: Did {deceasedName} legally adopt {applicantName}’s parent ({deceasedName}’s child)?
wholeBloodNieceOrNephewQuestion: Was this person’s parent legally adopted into {deceasedName}’s family?

applicantParentAdoptedIn.required: Select ‘Yes’ if {applicantName}’s parent was adopted by {deceasedName}
